languages.text: "Неужели?" {n} Взгляд Ларии прожигает не хуже мельта-заряда.{/n} "Прекрасная мысль. Начнем прямо сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "Неужели?" {n} Взгляд Ларии прожигает не хуже мельта-заряда.{/n} "Прекрасная мысль. Начнем прямо сейчас".

languages.text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."
languages.original_text: "Неужели?" {n} Взгляд Ларии прожигает не хуже мельта-заряда.{/n} "Прекрасная мысль. Начнем прямо сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."
"Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."
"Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

languages.text: “是吗？”{n}菈丽雅的目光灼热得像热熔炸弹。{/n}“好主意。那现在就开始吧。”
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: “是吗？”{n}菈丽雅的目光灼热得像热熔炸弹。{/n}“好主意。那现在就开始吧。”

languages.text: {n}Le regard de Laria se fait aussi brûlant qu'une charge à fusion.{/n} « Vraiment ? En voilà, une excellente idée ! Autant commencer tout de suite. »
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard de Laria se fait aussi brûlant qu'une charge à fusion.{/n} « Vraiment ? En voilà, une excellente idée ! Autant commencer tout de suite. »

languages.text: "Öyle mi?" {n}Laria'nın melta bombası kadar sıcak bakışları, âdeta gözlerini kavuruyor.{/n} "Harika fikir. Hemen başlayalım."
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle mi?" {n}Laria'nın melta bombası kadar sıcak bakışları, âdeta gözlerini kavuruyor.{/n} "Harika fikir. Hemen başlayalım."

languages.text: «¿Es eso cierto?». {n}La mirada de Laria arde como una carga de fusión.{/n} «Qué idea tan espléndida. Empecemos ahora mismo».
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: «¿Es eso cierto?». {n}La mirada de Laria arde como una carga de fusión.{/n} «Qué idea tan espléndida. Empecemos ahora mismo».

languages.text: "Tatsächlich?" {n}Larias Blick brennt heißer als eine Melterladung.{/n} "Was für eine famose Idee. Fangen wir gleich damit an."
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: "Tatsächlich?" {n}Larias Blick brennt heißer als eine Melterladung."Was für eine famose Idee. Fangen wir gleich damit an."

languages.text: 「そうなの？」{n}ラリアの視線は溶鉱弾の熱さと同じくらい鋭く燃えている。{/n}「素晴らしいアイデアね。今すぐ始めよう。」
languages.original_text: "Is that so?" {n}Laria's gaze burns as hot as any melta charge.{/n} "What a splendid idea. Let's start right now."

traits.locale_text: 「そうなの？」{n}ラリアの視線は溶鉱弾の熱さと同じくらい鋭く燃えている。{/n}「素晴らしいアイデアね。今すぐ始めよう。」
